scripts.build: npm run build:ts && ../node_modules/.bin/browserify index.source.js --standalone OmegaTarget --exclude bluebird --exclude jsondiffpatch --exclude omega-pac -o index.js && ../node_modules/.bin/browserify index.source.js --standalone OmegaTarget | ../node_modules/.bin/esbuild --loader=js --minify > omega_target.min.js
